title: crotalaria ferruginea var. chiayiana
intro: Crotalaria ferruginea var. chiayiana, also known as Taiwan rattlebox, is a plant species belonging to the Legume family, native to Taiwan. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria ferruginea var. chiayiana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant's extracts as a supplement.
